link.title: Tracking Link
link.description: A customized URL that records visitor details before forwarding them.

id.description: Unique short identifier for the link.

title.description: Friendly name or title of the campaign.

creatorId.description: UID of the user who created the link.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the link was created.

clicksCount.description: Number of times the link was visited.

visit.title: Visit Entry
visit.description: Information collected from a user opening a tracking link.

id.description: Unique identifier of the visit record.

linkId.description: ID of the tracking link visited.

ip.description: Public IP address of the browser.

country.description: Country name or code derived from IP lookup.

latitude.description: Latitude estimated by IP or GPS tracker.

longitude.description: Longitude estimated by IP or GPS tracker.

accuracy.description: GPS accuracy in meters (null if IP-based).

method.description: The capture method: IP or GPS.

/links/{linkId}/visits/{visitId}.description: Collection of recorded visits under a specific link.
